title: How Payward Ships Faster with Codex
description_preview:
"Without Codex, we probably would be six months behind where we are today." 

Kamo Asatryan and his team are building the core infrastructure to power inference across all products at Payward. Speed is the #1 value for his team and Codex has unlocked the ability to ship faster. 🚀 

If you like to move slow 🐢 , don't click here: https://chatgpt.com/codex
